metadata.description: AuditOS Release 1 Static Business Unit Dataset

businessUnits.name: Information Security
businessUnits.description: Responsible for governance, policies, risk management, compliance, vulnerability management, incident response and security operations.

businessUnits.name: Corporate IT
businessUnits.description: Responsible for identity management, endpoint management, asset inventory, cloud administration and IT operations.

businessUnits.name: People Operations
businessUnits.description: Responsible for employee lifecycle, onboarding, offboarding, HR records, awareness training and background verification.

businessUnits.name: Legal & Compliance
businessUnits.description: Responsible for contracts, privacy, regulatory obligations and vendor compliance.

businessUnits.name: Finance
businessUnits.description: Responsible for procurement, budgeting, vendor payments and financial governance.

businessUnits.name: Information Security
businessUnits.description: Responsible for enterprise security, compliance and security operations.

businessUnits.name: Corporate IT
businessUnits.description: Responsible for IT infrastructure, identity management and endpoint administration.

businessUnits.name: People Operations
businessUnits.description: Responsible for employee onboarding, offboarding and personnel records.
